content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.epi.org/blog/most-minimum-wage-studies-have-found-little-or-no-job-loss/", "source_title": "Most minimum wage studies have found little or no job loss", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Most minimum wage studies have found little or no job loss There is always a great deal of political heat around minimum wage increases, lar...", "direct_quote": "Most minimum wage studies have found little or no job loss There is always a great deal of political heat around minimum wage increases, largely driven by concerns about job losses.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "A new review that I co-authored with Arindrajit Dube finds that most minimum wage studies find no job losses or only small disemployment eff...", "direct_quote": "A new review that I co-authored with Arindrajit Dube finds that most minimum wage studies find no job losses or only small disemployment effects.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "This conclusion is strengthened by focusing on the studies that examine broad groups of low-wage workers or the overall workforce, not just ...", "direct_quote": "This conclusion is strengthened by focusing on the studies that examine broad groups of low-wage workers or the overall workforce, not just narrow segments like teenagers.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
